results.query: migrate all vllm instances to a new GPU server

arguments.reason: Migrating all vllm instances to a new GPU server is a complex, multi-step infrastructure change requiring coordination. This involves: identifying current vllm services (vllm-35b, vllm-8b, vllm-4b on spark-01, vllm-vlm on marvin), provisioning/validating the new GPU server, migrating configurations and model weights, updating the llm-proxy and any dependent services, and managing cutover/downtime. This requires human judgment on timing, resource allocation, and rollback planning.

results.query: reconfigure Caddy to add a new domain with TLS

arguments.reason: Reconfiguring Caddy to add a new domain with TLS requires: (1) knowledge of the specific domain name and DNS setup, (2) the backend service/port to proxy to, (3) potential DNS changes, and (4) careful validation to avoid breaking existing site configurations. This is a configuration change with production impact that requires human oversight.
